## What does this PR do?

<!-- A concise description of the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Generator added or updated
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Docs / SAD update
- [ ] Tooling / config change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:cli` (dry-run) output looks correct
- [ ] New generators have been tested with `npm run test:cli:write`
- [ ] SAD updated if architecture or decisions changed (`docs/sad/`)
